description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with a predominantly white exterior and clean, geometric lines. The structure features multiple flat roofs, some of which are green roofs with vegetation and small garden areas. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. A garage is integrated into the left side of the building, and a patio with a tree and tiled flooring is visible on one side. The house is surrounded by landscaped greenery, including shrubs and a prominent tree near the entrance. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, open spaces, and a strong connection to outdoor elements.
description: A modern, white cubic house with flat green roofs, large asymmetrical windows, a garage, and landscaped greenery including a patio and tree.
description_view_0: This view shows the long, white facade with minimal windows, a tiled patio, and a large tree on the left side.
description_view_1: From the rear, the green roofs and rooftop gardens are prominent, with fewer windows and a more enclosed appearance.
description_view_2: This angle highlights the garage, rooftop garden, and the main entry area with a tree and patio visible to the right.
description_view_3: The side view focuses on the patio area with the large tree and the vertical arrangement of windows on the white facade.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door, tiled patio, and is accentuated by a large tree and minimal overhang.
